series.title: The Boondocks
series.description: A satirical animated series about a black family, the Freemans, settling into the fictional, white suburb of Woodcrest.

series.title: Smiling Friends
series.description: Follows the employees of a small company dedicated to bringing happiness to a bizarre yet colorful world.

series.title: Scavengers Reign
series.description: The survivors of a damaged deep-space freighter are stranded on a beautiful yet unforgiving alien planet.

series.title: Fionna and Cake
series.description: Fionna and Cake—with the help of the former Ice King, Simon Petrikov—embark on a multiverse-hopping adventure.

series.title: Adventure Time
series.description: A young boy named Finn and his best friend Jake, a dog with magical powers, go on adventures in the Land of Ooo.

series.title: Over the Garden Wall
series.description: Two half-brothers travel across a mysterious forest to find their way home, encountering strange and wonderful things.

series.title: Bojack Horseman
series.description: BoJack Horseman, the washed-up star of the 1990s sitcom 'Horsin' Around,' navigates life with his human sidekick Todd and feline agent Princess Carolyn.

series.title: Family Guy Season 23
series.description: The latest adventures of the Griffin family in Quahog.

vip_bundle.description: Get lifetime access to all 6 standard series (The Boondocks, Smiling Friends, Scavengers Reign, Fionna and Cake, Adventure Time, Over the Garden Wall).
